title: GP in-hours: weekly bulletins for 2026
body: "Monitoring the number of visits to GPs during regular surgery hours for important clinical indicators. This system reports daily and covers over 55% of England’s population.  Previous years’ weekly bulletins are also available for:   2025 2024 2023 2022 2021 2020 2019 2018 2017 2016 2015 2014  "
